title: This Hub
description: Makes players' stay in the hub/lobby more pleasant and comfortable
body:
### Support and Feedback 💬
If you have questions, suggestions, or have found a bug, please contact me:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/yf23xT9Z8j)

### ![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0e92ff292d34b70cec3878a85e9d6a1c40ca26_0.webp)
##
## Makes players' stay in the hub/lobby more pleasant and comfortable

### Possibilities:

- Removal of entry/exit messages.
- Spavn at a certain point.
- Particles on entry.
- Item to move to the server.
- Sound accompaniment.

### In configuration:
- Entry messages.
- Set a specific spawn location and its coordinates/world.
- Enabling particles.
- Enabling sounds.
- Sound customization: volume, pitch, sound.
- Issuing an item.
- Setting item name and server to move the item.


_Sponsors - Empty🥺_
